testcase.name: changeSeatsToOrder_eventNotFound_returnsFail

No changes needed.

testcase.name: changeSeatsToOrder_nonActiveOrder_returnsFail
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.990 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: Attempting to change seats for order order_1 with new seats [1-3]. 15:30:53.991 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: Verifying session token for change. 15:30:53.991 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.992 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: verifying that order order_1 belongs to the user with the provided token for changing seats. 15:30:53.992 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: verifying that order order_1 is a seat order for changing seats. 15:30:53.992 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: verifying that order order_1 is active for changing seats. 15:30:53.992 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.OrderService -- OrderService.changeSeatsToOrder: order_1
